title: The Pusher's Shadow
content: You follow the man's directions to a dim alleyway behind the tube station. A dealer known as 'Rat' leans against a damp brick wall, cleaning his nails with a switchblade.||'Vane?' Rat laughs, teeth yellow and crooked. 'Yeah, he was here. Bought the heavy stuff. High-grade synthetic. Said he needed it to keep the voices quiet while he wrote his manifestos.'||He hands you a small, empty vial with Vane's initials scrawled on the label in black marker. 'He left this behind last time. A little souvenir for his detective friend.'||📝 FILES UPDATED: Vane's personal vial recovered (Suspected drugs).||Is this really who Vane was? The deeper you go into this lead, the more his image as a hero begins to crumble. But something feels off. The vial is too clean. The Rat's story is too convenient.
